info.description: Generated from the Spring Boot controllers and DTOs.
info.title: Munich Weekly API

delete.description: Removes a linked third-party identity provider from the authenticated user.

post.description: Accepts a password reset request and returns a generic response regardless of account existence.
Authenticates a registered user and returns a JWT token with user profile details.

get.description: Returns the third-party identity providers linked to the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates an email/password account and returns a JWT token.
Resets an account password using a valid password reset token.

get.description: Returns all weekly issues in the system.

post.description: Creates a weekly issue with submission and voting windows. Admin access is required.

delete.description: Deletes an issue when dependency rules allow it. Admin access is required.

get.description: Returns one issue by ID. Admin access is required.

put.description: Updates an existing weekly issue. Admin access is required.

get.description: Returns image storage status for a submission. Only the submission owner or an admin may inspect it.

403.description: Current user is neither the submission owner nor an admin

get.description: Returns raw image bytes for a submission. Only the submission owner or an admin may read it.

403.description: Current user is neither the submission owner nor an admin

404.description: Submission image is missing or unavailable

get.description: Checks whether the current authenticated user or anonymous visitor has voted for a capped list of submissions.

400.description: Invalid or too many submission IDs

tags.description: Login, registration, and linked provider account management
tags.name: Authentication

tags.description: Weekly photo issue scheduling and admin management
tags.name: Issues

tags.description: Vote submission and vote status endpoints
tags.name: Votes
